summary: Excellent audience recording from the historic Kiel Auditorium with clear sound
review: The sole review praises the tape as a great audience (AUD) capture, highlighting the clarity and thanking the tapers. No specific comments about the musical performance or setlist are provided, so the show quality cannot be assessed beyond the positive impression of the venue atmosphere.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 4‑star review emphasizes a high‑quality audience recording but offers no detail on performance, leading to a solid yet limited rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the AUD "great" and expresses gratitude to tapers, indicating clear, well‑balanced sound despite being an audience source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided about setlist or performance flow.
